name: TCIL_SetResponseContent
title: TCIL_SetResponseContent
syntax: long TCIL_SetResponseContent(dbNode client, dword command, dword subcommand, pg pgPD); // form 1
long TCIL_SetResponseContent(dword addressClient, dword command, dword subcommand, pg pgPD); // form 2
long TCIL_SetResponseContent(dbNode tc, dbNode client, dword command, dword subcommand, pg pgPD); // form 3
long TCIL_SetResponseContent(dbNode tc, dword addressClient, dword command, dword subcommand, pg pgPD); // form 4
description: The function changes the content of the next TC response TC12 sent by the TC IL to allow fault injection.

parameters.name: tc
parameters.description: TC simulation node to apply the function.

parameters.name: client
parameters.description: Task Controller client which is the originator of the command and receiver of the response message.

parameters.name: addressClient
parameters.description: Address of the Task Controller client which is the originator of the command and receiver of the response message.

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: Refers to the response with this command value, 0..15.

parameters.name: subcommand
parameters.description: Refers to the response with this subcommand value (is only used if command is 0 or 1), 0..15.

parameters.name: pgPD
parameters.description: This message replaces the Process Data response of the Task Controller IL.

return: Refers to the response with this subcommand
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
